q.en: According to the book, about what percent of Earth's usable water is in the ground?
q.zh: 根据本书，地球可用水中大约有多少百分比在地下？

options.en: 25 percent according to some versions of the story

explain.en: 'Scientists say that 99 percent of Earth's usable water is in the ground.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“科学家表示，地球可用水的99%都在地下。”

options.en: rivers on the surface according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 地表河流（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: underground layers of rock, sand, and other material that can hold and absorb groundwater
options.zh: 能蓄含和吸收地下水的岩石、沙等地下地层

explain.en: Glossary: 'aquifers (n.) underground layers of rock, sand, and other material that can hold and absorb groundwater (p. 5).'
explain.zh: 词汇表：aquifers 意为“能蓄含和吸收地下水的岩石、沙等地下地层（第5页）”。

q.en: In 2014, about how many dry wells resulted from the California drought?
q.zh: 2014年，加州干旱导致大约多少口井干涸？

options.en: two million according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 两百万口（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: 'The result was some two thousand dry wells in 2014.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“结果是2014年出现了大约两千口干井。”

q.en: Why did smaller farmers near Sonoma Valley blame winemakers?
q.zh: 索诺玛谷附近的小农户为什么责怪酿酒商？

options.en: Winemakers grew too many grapes according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 酿酒商种了太多葡萄（按书中另一种说法）

options.en: Winemakers used too much water from shared groundwater
options.zh: 酿酒商从共享的地下水中取用了太多水

explain.en: Smaller farmers 'blame winemakers for sucking up too much of the groundwater they all share... their shallower wells go dry.'
explain.zh: 小农户“责怪酿酒商抽走了他们共享的太多地下水……他们较浅的井干涸了”。

q.en: The book compares everyone's use of groundwater to 'straws in the same drink.' What point is it making?
q.zh: 本书把每个人使用地下水比作“插在同一杯饮料里的吸管”。它在说明什么？

options.en: Some users can pay for more/longer straws, taking more than their fair share
options.zh: 有些使用者能花钱买更多更长的吸管，占用了超过公平份额的水

options.en: Drinks taste better with straws according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 用吸管饮料更好喝（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

explain.en: 'It's as if everyone has their straws in the same drink, but some farms and businesses can pay for more and longer straws.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“就好像每个人的吸管都插在同一杯饮料里，但有些农场和企业能花钱买更多更长的吸管。”

q.en: Experts predict that by the year 2030 the world will fall how short of its water needs?
q.zh: 专家预测到2030年，全球水资源缺口将达到多少？

explain.en: 'If nothing changes, they estimate the world will fall 40 percent short of its water needs by the year 2030.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“如果什么都不改变，他们估计到2030年世界将短缺40%的用水需求。”

q.en: In the 'Trouble with Toilets' section, what uses more water than anything else in a house?
q.zh: 在“马桶的麻烦”一节中，房子里什么最耗水？

explain.en: 'Did you know that toilets use more water than anything else in your house?'
explain.zh: 书里说：“你知道吗，马桶是你家里最耗水的东西？”

q.en: What change did California make during its record drought?
q.zh: 加州在创纪录的干旱期间做出了什么改变？

options.en: Built new oceans according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 新建海洋（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: Went from 140 gallons per person to 67 gallons a day in six months
options.zh: 六个月内从人均140加仑降到日均67加仑

explain.en: 'In just six months, people there went from using as much as 140 gallons (530 L) per person to just 67 gallons (254 L) a day, on average.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“仅仅六个月，当地人从人均多达140加仑（530升）降到日均仅67加仑（254升）。”

q.en: What is the author's main purpose in writing Groundwater?
q.zh: 作者写《地下水》的主要目的是什么？

options.en: To entertain with a story according to some versions of the story in an early draft of the book
options.zh: 用一个故事来娱乐（按书中另一种说法）（在书的早期草稿中）

options.en: To explain why groundwater matters and persuade readers to conserve it
options.zh: 解释地下水为何重要，并劝说读者保护它

explain.en: The focus question is 'Why is groundwater important?' and the book ends urging 'we can be smarter about how we use this resource.'
explain.zh: 焦点问题是“地下水为什么重要？”，书末敦促“我们可以更明智地使用这一资源”。

q.en: What is one smarter farming method mentioned to save groundwater?
q.zh: 书中提到哪种更聪明的农耕方法可以节省地下水？

options.en: Burying irrigation pipes and using meters to monitor soil moisture
options.zh: 埋设灌溉管道并用仪表监测土壤湿度

options.en: Spraying more water on the surface according to some versions of the story
options.zh: 在地表喷更多水（按书中另一种说法）

explain.en: 'New meters monitor moisture in the soil... Many fruit and nut orchards now bury irrigation pipes to waste less water.'
explain.zh: 书里说：“新的仪表监测土壤湿度……许多果树和坚果园现在埋设灌溉管道以减少浪费。”

prompt.en: Write a short public-service announcement persuading your community to conserve water. Include one fact from the book.
prompt.zh: 写一段简短的公益宣传，劝说你的社区节约用水。要包含书中的一个事实。

en: Start with a fact (e.g., 99% of usable water is underground).
Give 2 easy actions people can take at home.
zh: 以某个事实开头（如：可用水的99%在地下）。
给出人们在家就能做的两个简单行动。
